economic_notes: God's River Development Corporation (o/a God's River Lodge) accounted for by modified equity method. MSCN is guarantor of loans for Gods River Economic Development Corp. of $362,149. COVID-19 noted as a subsequent event with unknown financial impact.
notes: Consolidated entity includes MSCN, MSCN Housing Authority, Amos Okemow Memorial Education Authority Inc., and Manto Sipi Cree Nation Construction Ltd. God's River Development Corporation accounted for by modified equity method (GBE). Large construction in progress of $39.5M primarily related to ISC School Project ($34.1M). Significant increase in deferred revenue from $2M to $7.9M. Annual surplus of $22M is large relative to expenses due to ISC capital funding being recognized. Current liabilities calculated as bank indebtedness ($187,153) plus accounts payable ($9,103,037). No schedule of remuneration provided in the extracted text.
